prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: Frontier orbital energies and HOMO–LUMO gap of the O2 molecule (triplet ground state), values in eV.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting) in PySCF 2.x.
Geometry provenance: single-point on the user-supplied oxygen.xyz (no geometry relaxation; calculation is DFT//user-provided geometry).
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 3 (open-shell UKS).
SCF convergence: reached in 7 cycles; scf_converged = true.
Warnings: no warnings reported.
Computed quantities (eV):
  HOMO = –8.8739616
  LUMO = –3.5859031
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586
Command + files: see cli invocation recorded in the result JSON:

Integrity verdict: trustworthy (all checks passed).
